subject: grammar
title: Exercise — Adverb Position and Collocations (Environment Essay)
instruction:
Underline the correct words. Click the correct option.

Example: 1 → greatly reduce (already shown)
passage:
Environmentalists and conservationists tell us that there are ways that each of us can help to greatly reduce our impact on the planet. We can work hard to conserve energy and we can invest in equipment to help us create our own power. People often say that they want to save the planet, but the only way to do this is to take action immediately.

It is really important for individuals to act responsibly and try to reduce their contribution to greenhouse gases. There are several ways we can do this. For example there are mini wind turbines that you can install easily on your roof as well as very efficient solar panels that work well all year round to provide electricity.

But if this is all too expensive, there are other ways to conserve energy that actually save you money. In cooler weather, simply keep the heat safely inside by closing doors after you so that the warmth doesn't escape. It is absolutely essential that we all take this seriously and do our best to lead a more sustainable life.

questions.text: People ___ that they want to save the planet,
...but the only way to do this is to ___.
It is ___ for individuals to act responsibly
It is really important for individuals to ___ and try to reduce their contribution to greenhouse gases.
...mini wind turbines that you ___ on your roof
...solar panels that ___ all year round to provide electricity.
...simply keep the heat ___ by closing doors after you
It is ___ that we all take this seriously
